# VitalDash

> A free, privacy-first health calculator that goes beyond BMI. Provides BMI, BMR, TDEE, body fat estimate, ideal weight range, daily calorie target, macro splits, goal projection with timeline, NHANES-based percentile rankings, BMI reality check for athletic users, and a personalized 7-day starter plan. All calculations run client-side. No tracking, no signup.

## Key facts
- Built and maintained by Gaston, a private individual based in Belgium
- All formulas are peer-reviewed and cited (Mifflin-St Jeor 1990, Deurenberg 1991, ISSN 2017, WHO, CDC NHANES 2015-2018)
- Percentile rankings use real CDC NHANES data, not approximations
- Site is free; income from Amazon affiliate links and (eventually) AdSense
- All user data stays in their browser via localStorage; no server-side data collection

## Pages

- [Calculator (homepage)](https://vitaldash.io/): The main interactive dashboard with all calculators
- [Body Fat Calculator](https://vitaldash.io/body-fat-calculator): US Navy method body fat estimation with no calipers needed
- [Methodology](https://vitaldash.io/methodology.html): Every formula used, with peer-reviewed citations
- [About](https://vitaldash.io/about.html): Why VitalDash exists, what makes it different
- [Privacy Policy](https://vitaldash.io/privacy.html): GDPR-compliant data practices
- [Terms of Use](https://vitaldash.io/terms.html): Including the medical disclaimer
- [Cookie Policy](https://vitaldash.io/cookies.html): Plain-English explanation of localStorage usage
- [Contact](https://vitaldash.io/contact.html): Get in touch via contact form

## Calculations performed
- BMI (WHO standard, kg/m²)
- BMR (Mifflin-St Jeor 1990)
- TDEE (BMR × activity multiplier 1.2 to 1.9)
- Body fat percentage estimate (Deurenberg 1991)
- Ideal weight range (BMI 18.5 to 24.9)
- Daily calorie target (goal-adjusted)
- Macro split (goal-adjusted with 1.6 g/kg protein floor)
- Weight loss/gain projection (7,700 kcal per kg)
- BMI and weight percentile (NHANES 2015-2018, by age band and sex)
